texto: 'Texas Chainsaw Massacre' is just one of those movies that's like a page of history. You can't really go wrong. It's a prequel. It's not like number three. Which is really cool, to be the before as opposed to the after.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Diora Baird: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “'Texas Chainsaw Massacre' is just one of those movies that's like a page of history. You can't re…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, history, movies pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de movies e page.

frase_original: 'Texas Chainsaw Massacre' is just one of those movies that's like a page of history. You can't really go wrong. It's a prequel. It's not like number three. Which is really cool, to be the before as opposed to the after.
